name: @tediousjs/mssql-tedious
description: Tedious driver adapter for the @tediousjs/mssql-* family.

scripts.test: npm run build:test && find dist-test/test -type f -name '*.test.js' -exec node --test {} +
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:test && find dist-test/test -type f -name '*.test.js' -exec node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='dist-test/src/**' --test-coverage-lines=80 --test-coverage-functions=80 --test-coverage-branches=70 {} +
scripts.test:int: npm run build:test && find dist-test/test -type f -name '*.int.js' -exec node --test {} +
